title: CDFY
hook: A stronger affiliate-style funnel build designed to feel like a modern review and conversion machine rather than a thin promo page.
sections: Landing page, checkout review flow, upsell, downsell, offer wall, and placeholder funnel logic.
Gives the CDFY concept a clearer monetization path with better sequencing and stronger offer architecture.
Config-driven flow, clean visuals, review-mode checkout logic, and multi-page conversion structure.
Affiliate traffic, offer review visitors, and users comparing options before purchase.
Landing page -> checkout-style decision -> OTOs/downsell -> offer wall -> external monetization link.
Swap placeholders for final offers, add real tracking, and tighten proof and comparison sections.
